title: PvP Base Resource Pack
description: Base resource pack of pvp. Please download and enable to upgrade your experience.
body:
# 🔍 The Ultimate Resource Pack Designed for Enhanced Visibility
This resource pack is designed to maximize visibility during combat, exploration, and building.  
It highlights key information while preserving the vanilla atmosphere.

---

## ✨ Features

### 🔥 Low Fire and Low Shield
Keeps the screen clear when on fire.

### ⛰️ Fine-Tuning Terrain Colors
We’ve improved enemy visibility by darkening the brightness and saturation of certain blocks used in the terrain.

### 💡 Full Bright
It illuminates even dark areas without hesitation.

### 🎞️ Shader Optimization
We’ve optimized the processing of certain shaders.

### 🌧️ Improved Visibility on Rainy and Snowy Days
Reduces visual clutter caused by weather conditions.

### 🪄 Reduced Totem Activation Effects
Totem animations no longer cover the entire screen.

### 💧 Improved Water Transparency
We’ve improved visibility from above the water’s surface into the water. We also took care not to make the transparency too low, so we’ve made a “just right” adjustment that doesn’t ruin the vanilla atmosphere.

### 💥 Removal of Unnecessary Particles
Items removed:  
- Falling leaf particles  
- Heart particles when taking damage  
- Water splash particles  

### 🎃 Improved Visibility for Pumpkins and Powder Snow
This significantly reduces visual obstruction when wearing a pumpkin or standing on powder snow.

### ✨ Improved Distinguishability of Enchanted Items
Enchanted items are now visually easier to distinguish.

### 🪨 Ore Outlines
- Added outlines to all ores based on their respective ore colors  
- **Ancient Shards now glow with a rainbow-colored light**

### 🧊 Distinguishing Powder Snow from Regular Snow
Added a border to Powder Snow.

### 🧱 Reduced Terracotta and Concrete Textures
We’ve reduced the texture size to 1px to improve performance. While the vanilla texture is a 16px × 16px (256px) image, we’ve replaced it with a 1px × 1px image, reducing the size to 1/256th. Additionally, there is virtually no perceptible difference in color even when viewed up close.

### 🌐 Multilingual Support
Works with all vanilla-supported languages.

### 🔢 Numerical Effects & Enchantment Levels
Effects and enchantment levels are displayed using Arabic numerals.

---

## 🎯 Recommended for
- Players who regularly play PvP, RTA, SMP, or Survival
- Players who want to improve visibility without compromising the vanilla atmosphere
- Those looking for a lightweight and practical resource pack

---

## 📦 Supported Platforms
- **Minecraft Java Edition**  
- We plan to update regularly to match the latest version, but updates may be delayed.

## License
Please read the license carefully before using this resource pack.
